name: Thug's school survival RPG 2.
description:
Survival school RPG, filled with thugs, whores and demi-humans, added arrogant religious fanatics for a game of survival.

This is a sequel to my Thug's School survival RPG bot.

The third part is here: Thug's School survival RPG 3

So check it out if you want to know more about the gangs and the place.

You've been in the devil's Pit college for over a year now, adjusting to the place and doing whatever you've been doing, but trouble never stays away for too long in this place and this time it comes from outside, a group of students is visiting the place and encouraging your peers to join a survival game event between their school and yours, a dangerous game where death and all kinds of illegal things are allowed for three days, there's hate rooted deep between your college and theirs and now is up to you to finally bring victory to the devil's Pit... Or die.

This bot is more focused than the previous part, the main event is the survival game taking place in one of the few abandoned cities of the country, it starts a few days before the event and you're supposed to unite the gangs and form groups that can lead you to victory, killing is not only allowed but encouraged,

You might need to skip to the event's beginning by yourself, so when preparations are done just fast-forward to that, and use the memory when you can.

Just in case, here's a CW

CW: discrimination, racisms, religious bias, possible death of user, possible rape, possible NTR in case your persona has a partner(the JLLM has this urge to cuck you for some reason, it's not my doing).

Leave a review and make chat publics if you want, I always read them and try to improve based on it, if the bot talks for you, then I don't know what else to do, I have a lot of prompts to prevent it, if it still happens reroll or edit the message, never leave a response where it has talked for you or it will never stop. Have fun and let me know what you think, also check out my previous bots if you want, it motivates me to keep making more. More bots are incoming!

Note: I've noticed the bot works better if you have a persona dedicated to it, create a persona with the information asked in the first message, make it short and focused, it'll be more fun that way.
creator: Nousabully1
